title: Tracker mental-model alignment: drop milestone + due, codify philosophy, surface priority
description: Drop project-management residue (`milestone`, `due`) from the issue tracker schema. Make priority a first-class index column. Codify the tracker's actual purpose — comprehensive memory of thought-work for AI-augmented development, not project planning — in user-guide, plugin skill, and CLAUDE.md so the dropped fields don't get re-introduced. Includes best-practice rules: 1 component per issue (multiple = exception), ≥1 subtask for AI-handoff-bound issues.
author: sidhantha
